programme.title: E28 - In Fougeres (3)

programme.title: E30 - La Rioja/Irun/Paella
programme.desc: On the agenda: discovering the heritage of the La Rioja region in Spain; a visit to Irun in the Basque Country, between historical remains and an ecological park; a recipe for duck breast paella.

programme.title: E13 - Sandra Benhamou/Pelagia Kolotouros/Marie-Cecile Kfouri
programme.desc: In the heart of Brittany, visit the Pont-Aven museum. Interior design and a passion for cinema come together in Sandra Benhamou's world. programme.title: E92
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E259 -Dongji Rescue
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: A Taxi Driver
programme.desc: May 1980. A Seoul taxi driver named Man-seob comes across an offer too good to be true. If he drives a foreign passenger from Seoul down to Gwangju and back again before the curfew, he'll be paid the unthinkable sum of 100,000 won – enough to cover several months of unpaid rent. Without stopping to ask the details, he picks up the German reporter Peter and sets off along the highway. Although stopped by police roadblocks at the edge of Gwangju, Man-seob is desperate to earn his taxi fare, and eventually manages to find a way into the city. There they encounter students and ordinary citizens taking part in large-scale demonstrations against the government. Man-seob, alarmed by the danger in the air, pleads with Peter to go quickly back to Seoul. But Peter ignores him...

programme.title: Fragments of the Last Will
programme.desc: In 1945, after the end of World War II, Hatao Yamamoto was imprisoned in a concentration camp in Sibera, Russia. Despite the harsh, despairing condition in the camp, Hatao Yamamoto kept telling other prisoners not to give up hope, and that the day when they could all go back home would come. Hatao Yamamoto firmly believed that he would return to Japan and meet his wife, Mojimi Yamamoto, and their children someday. 8 years after the war, he received a postcard from his wife with a one-line message written on it, stating that “We are waiting for you to come back”. Meanwhile, Hatao Yamamoto's health was deteriorating rapidly. After having a diagnosis, the doctor told him that he had only three months left... After listening to his friends' advices, he decided to write a will and left it to his friends to bring it to his family when they were released. However, the will was seen as a spying message by the officers in the concentration camp and was confiscated...

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E259 -Dongji Rescue

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Dojo and May are a loving couple. Because Dojo has a brain tumor and needs 1 million baht for the operation, they decide to rob a money exchange store. Unluckily, the couple with 10 unfortunate patrons of the money exchange center are held hostages by 3 professional robbers on the same day. It is a robbery inside another robbery as well as some secrets among these people will be revealed. What could possibly happen when these people are trapped in the store with no way to escape?

programme.title: E6 - Gangsters
programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: E3 - Water Worlds
programme.desc: Wade into wetlands, where trees and water meet to nurture new life. Dive into an underwater forest that protects young fur seals, visit a mangrove sanctuary where a curious band of aquatic misfits hides out, and meet some real-life swamp monsters.

programme.title: E4 - Mountains
programme.desc: Climb into a realm of thin air and towering rock. Tag along as mythical monkeys battle for a winter food stash, sing along with lemurs in a fruit-filled tree canopy, and watch an aromatic tree bring together blossom and possum in a moonlit tryst.

programme.title: E6 - Gangsters
programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: E7 - Dino
programme.desc: T-Rex and chickens seem to be as different as they can be, but they more in common that you might think. Recent research reveals that some of our favorite dinosaurs were very birdlike, and that birds are an extant kind of dinosaurs.

programme.title: E6 - Gangsters
programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: E2 - Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Tune into the natural world and explore frequencies beyond human hearing, like the gentle hum of giraffes in the evening, or creatures who use song to claim territory on a seemingly silent coral reef.

programme.title: How Community Efforts Can Lead To Transformation
programme.desc: A video podcast from Kenya about community climate initiatives. Uganda's Bee Run; how citizen science improves air quality; and a resilient cotton returns to Senegal.

programme.title: How Can Wildlife Accidents Be Avoided?
programme.desc: Collisions with wildlife. How can they be prevented? What happens to the animals that survive crashes with cars going at speeds of 100 km/h or more? How do elephants react? What should drivers do when an animal suddenly appears on the road? And could high-tech systems prevent these collisions?

programme.title: Mental Health: Ill Or Just Wired Differently?
programme.desc: Is a lack of concentration a sign of ADHD? Is a spell of feeling down actually depression? In Good Shape looks at mental health and neurodiversity.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: Echappees Belles S19
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismael Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: E34 - Daisy Shows Off
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

E5 - Crowning Around
programme.desc: Rajiv feels devastated when he loses his crown, thinking that it's the reason he is good at anything, but he soon learns that can still be really useful.

programme.title: E22 - Dinosaur
programme.desc: The children want to make a big dinosaur model so they can learn all about it. They make such a huge dinosaur that they want to take it to the museum to be shown as an exhibit.

programme.title: E32 - Tradies
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: E33 - Granny Mobile
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: E37 - The Traffic Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels begin a trip to the lake, but get stuck in a traffic jam!

programme.title: E51 - Ilulissat, Greenland
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch has travelled to Ilulissat in Greenland to show his teddy, Cuddles, the sights. But Cuddles ends up getting stuck in the snow!

programme.title: E26 - Kiwi
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Kiwi performing Do the Kiwi Dance - if he manages to find someone to interview him first.

programme.title: E78 - Up Down, Down Up
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po drive the Tubby Car to the Hidey Hup where they discover the Tubby Uppy Downy. They have fun going up down, down up!

programme.title: E2 - Hiccups
programme.desc: Messy's hiccups cause a landslide while he is out on a nature walk. Will he be able to find his way home? And will he ever stop hiccupping?

programme.title: E36 - Dirt
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: E3 - The Transport Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.title: E2 - The Face Painting Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone who looks like Enid, only much too big. Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid!

programme.title: E37 - Mr Monkeyjocks
programme.desc: Dad thinks the kids have too many toys and suggests a chuck out. To save their beloved Mr Monkeyjocks from getting the chop, Bluey and Bingo must prove he is special.

programme.title: E1 - Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: E2 - Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: E10 - The Honey Badge
programme.desc: Duggee's made some delicious pancakes, but the clubhouse is out of honey. Time for the bees to get busy!

programme.title: E8 - The Kite Badge
programme.desc: It's a very windy day and the squirrels want to play outside. What can they do? Duggee knows - he's flying his kite. The Squirrels set about making their own kites to fly.

programme.title: E2 - Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The contestants are helicoptered into dangerous alpine terrain, where they must climb to the top of a jagged cliff. Meanwhile, tempers flare between mother and daughter, and with little food, some contestants are running out of steam.

programme.title: E6 - Home Sweet Jet Truck
programme.desc: The Darnell's celebrate their return home by blowing off some explosive redneck frustration while Brooke tries to keep something very special under wraps.

programme.title: E2 - Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The contestants are helicoptered into dangerous alpine terrain, where they must climb to the top of a jagged cliff. Meanwhile, tempers flare between mother and daughter, and with little food, some contestants are running out of steam.

programme.title: E2 - An Airplane's 2nd Life
programme.desc: A passenger aircraft is stripped down. But the aircraft is not decommissioned - it is given a special conversion and begins a second life as a cargo jet. In just a few months, 600 men and women transform a passenger jet into a long-haul cargo plane - a masterpiece of aeronautical engineering! During the conversion, they give the old aircraft up to 30 percent more storage space and reduce fuel consumption per tonne of payload by 20 percent. Various parts have to be converted or removed and replaced - there is a lot to do.

programme.title: E4 - Terry's Reindeer Game
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a scene from Reindeer Games when Ben Affleck and Charlize Theron get trapped under a frozen lake, and they escape by shooting 3 shots with a 12-gauge shot gun underwater to blast a hole in the ice to escape.

programme.title: E3 - Bad News
programme.desc: With the gas still not connected in the kitchen, Sarah is unable to train her staff or test the new menu. As the restaurant launch fast approaches there’s more bad news that could put Sarah’s big plans in jeopardy.

programme.title: E212 - The Big Muck

programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: The Exchange

programme.title: E6 - 解鎖江蘇園林之美
programme.desc: 聚焦「非物質文化遺產」主題，由孟非領銜，並邀請了數位00後的非物質文化遺產研學團，一同圍繞8個主題進行深度探訪，旨在全方位、立體化地展現非物質文化遺產的深厚底蘊與時代風采。

programme.title: E4 - 藍盈瑩九郎體驗畬族婚禮
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E4 - 藍盈瑩九郎體驗畬族婚禮
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E43
programme.desc: 突破傳統的交友方式，24位單身女生以亮燈和滅燈方式來決定男嘉賓去留，通過「愛之初體驗」、「愛之再判斷」、「愛之終決選」、「男生權利」等決定男女嘉賓的速配成功。

programme.title: E6 - 解鎖江蘇園林之美
programme.desc: 聚焦「非物質文化遺產」主題，由孟非領銜，並邀請了數位00後的非物質文化遺產研學團，一同圍繞8個主題進行深度探訪，旨在全方位、立體化地展現非物質文化遺產的深厚底蘊與時代風采。

programme.title: E5 - 劉耀文上演霸總文學
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E5 - 劉耀文上演霸總文學

programme.title: Savdhaan India -Naya Adhyay
programme.desc: The host provides an in-depth analysis of some of the most shocking real-life crime stories in India and sheds light on how the victims fought back for justice.

programme.title: Na Umra Ki Seema Ho
programme.desc: Vidhi, a young woman, falls in love with Devratha, a middle-aged tycoon. Together they embark on a journey of love, and acceptance beyond the barrier of age.

programme.title: Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: Saraswati Chandra
programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: E5 - South Yarra And Flemington
programme.desc: A little Melbourne workers' cottage gets a radical reimagining as a Mid Century Palm Springs oasis, while across town, a backyard shed is transformed into a Japanese bathhouse.

programme.title: E7 - Kyneton, Vic
programme.desc: A couple ask their son and daughter-in-law to create a unique garden in Kyneton in Victoria. But do they have the courage to embrace a design that will transform their bland backyard into a striking sculptural showcase?

programme.title: E11 - Iran Is Running Out Of Water
programme.desc: Water is the lifeblood of all civilisations. In Iran, the water is drying up. The result is a slow-moving environmental emergency now pressing into politics, daily life, and the stability of the regime itself.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Connor O'Leary, a Cronulla surfer who now surfs for Japan. Pasifika rugby league players on their connection to their homeland. And Gronya Somerville, a badminton player exploring her ties to Chinese aristocracy.

programme.title: E55
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: E71
programme.desc: Start your day with all the news you need. Catherine Murphy is in Adelaide for the AFL's Gather Round, joined by Emma Rebellato with the latest news and interviews, Charles Brice with sport and Nate Byrne with weather.

programme.title: E71
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: E11 - Senator Matthew Canavan - Leader Of The Nationals
programme.desc: Senator Matthew Canavan, Leader of The Nationals, Shadow Minister for Trade, Investment and Tourism, delivers his first leaders Address to the National Press Club.

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, investors, employees and businesses big and small. Presented by Alicia Barry.

programme.title: E2 - Aussie Rules Football
programme.desc: Dr Karl unravels how leather, laces, and over a century of craft produce the sacred ball at the centrepiece of the nation's favourite game, Aussie Rules Football.

programme.title: E11 - Senator Matthew Canavan - Leader Of The Nationals
programme.desc: Senator Matthew Canavan, Leader of The Nationals, Shadow Minister for Trade, Investment and Tourism, delivers his first leaders Address to the National Press Club.

programme.title: Mermaids
programme.desc: Ant is determined to find out what the mermaid-shaped thing is swimming outside the Aronnax. The search leads him straight to the pirates.

programme.title: Crusty Bogies!
programme.desc: How are bogies made? With the help of a supersized nose, the doctors make their own! We follow Dr Ronx on a busy hospital shift and Gladiator Dynamite kicks off a foot Body Battle!

programme.title: River Race
programme.desc: Darwin, Newts and Heni compete in a river race using rubber band boats, but when Newts' boat zooms off in the wrong direction, they have to work out why.

programme.title: Orca Baby
programme.desc: Morgan, the deaf orca, is about to give birth to her very first calf. The stakes are high, and the staff at Loro Parque are holding their collective breath as the scene is set for the greatest natural phenomenon in the zoo's history.

programme.title: Kite Shenanigans
programme.desc: Eric builds a new kite. He makes sure it is symmetrical – both sides are exactly the same – as that helps kites fly and stay balanced in the air. He learns that there are lots of different types of kites but they all need the wind to fly.

programme.title: Hopes and Dreams
programme.desc: The Icicles have made it to the World Synchro Championships and are heading to Canada. After a season of flawless performances, can the girls pull off their Bollywood routine? The end of season Gala is near, but preparations aren't running as smoothly as everyone hoped.

programme.title: It's Gala Time!
programme.desc: As the ice skating season draws to a close, there is the annual event in the calendar that everyone is talking about. All the Ice Stars gather together for some sensational Hollywood-themed performances. For the Icicles, it's the last time they'll skate together.

programme.title: Albert In Love
programme.desc: Little Albert is infatuated with Jessie and will try anything to win her love, even if it involves pretending to be something he's not. He eventually learns that he doesn't need to go to such lengths to impress her.

programme.title: The Missing Mammoth
programme.desc: Ms. Bell has planned to surprise her students by hiding mammoth fossils in the school sandpit for them to dig up. But the surprise is on Ms. Bell and her students when the fossils disappear – and Addison has figure out where they went.

programme.title: Oil Platform
programme.desc: A visit to an oil platform leads to an accident that Kit and Mr. Battery must set right.

programme.title: Trip to Canada
programme.desc: Everybody knows that at school you learn about letters and numbers, history, poetry, and lots of other things. But in Canada, at school, you can also learn about fishing. It's time for another trip. And, of course, we will meet one of Alim's penfriends - Sakari.

programme.title: Trip to Iran
programme.desc: Zoe has to make some complicated calculations, but she has no electronic device at hand that could help her with that, so she is in a bit of a panic. Milo does not seem to have an answer. As for Alim, he sees the solution to her problems in a trip to Iran!

programme.title: Engaging Engineering
programme.desc: How do simple building elements create architecture? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of construction. Have hands-on fun by building your own tower, and get to know Fazlur Rahman Khan, who came up with the ‘tube' structure in skyscraper design.

programme.title: Farmer Cats for a Day
programme.desc: Granny Pina has run out of ingredients for the apple pie, so she goes to the farm with the Buffycats. Assisted by Corney, the farmer cat, they help Granny by getting everything she needs... but will they manage to keep hungry birds away?

programme.title: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: The kids endure public humiliation performing the worst play of all time for their classmates and family. While in between performances, the gang gains a new perspective on history and decides to put a new spin on an old story.

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Utah adventure: White water rafting near Salt Lake City, bobsled racing at Utah Olympic Park, fearless rappelling in Moab, and off-the-grid dinosaur excavation. A week of thrilling escapades with Nicole and local teens in the great state of Utah!

programme.title: Oil Platform
programme.desc: A visit to an oil platform leads to an accident that Kit and Mr. Battery must set right.

programme.title: It's Hairy!
programme.desc: Can you lift a car with a ponytail? The doctors put the strength of human hair to the test and find out what makes different colours and types of hair.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Guitar
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Guitar. Guitar and the band want to put on one last show before they retire but they don't have a singer.

programme.title: Future of Space Medicine
programme.desc: Host Emily Calandrelli explores the future of space medicine and how we may overcome the challenges ahead. She operates a small surgical robot and 3D prints a custom medical device.

programme.title: It's Hairy!
programme.desc: Can you lift a car with a ponytail? The doctors put the strength of human hair to the test and find out what makes different colours and types of hair.

programme.title: A Tornado in a Bottle
programme.desc: Eric pretends to be a tornado. He finds out they happen when the wind starts rotating really fast in a vortex – a whirlpool shape. Then he learns how to make a tornado using recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: The Acid Test!
programme.desc: The doctors test how strong your stomach acid really is. And will it be Dr Chris, Dr Xand or Dr Ronx who gets snotted in Ouchology?

programme.title: Trip to Canada
programme.desc: Everybody knows that at school you learn about letters and numbers, history, poetry, and lots of other things. But in Canada, at school, you can also learn about fishing. It's time for another trip. And, of course, we will meet one of Alim's penfriends - Sakari.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Point Of No Return
programme.desc: After police detective Lau is ambushed and killed, his best friend Pitt vows to get the killer. A series of investigation follows. Pitt finally finds an eyewitness to the killing - Fat Goose who is persuaded to testify against the killer Lam Man Fu. Lam Man Fu chases and attacks Pitt and Fat Goose. Finally, Pitt arrests him but Superintendent Keung frees Lam Man Fu and removes Pitt from the case. Then Lam Man Fu firebombs Fat Goose's residence. Fat Goose moves into Pitt's home and strikes a fast friendship with Angel, Pitt's reporter sister...

programme.title: From Riches To Rags
programme.desc: Ricky and Fatso are friends in need. They are in dire need of money since they are only paid slave wages at the bottling factory. By nature, Ricky is a dreamer. In his day dreams, he is romancing with Jo Jo, the movie idol. Ricky and Fatso buy a lottery ticket and become millionaires overnight. In one of these nights out in town, Ricky is suddenly attacked by an upset stomach. In no time, a quack doctor diagnoses the seizure as terminal cancer. Ricky seriously considers suicide. But he is also appalled by the drawbacks inherent in the many methods of doing himself in primarily the pain. It is on a rooftop from which he is supposed to make a plunge that he saves a poor man from suicide by giving the latter all the money he has. In gratitude, the newly rich man promises to hire a killer to finish off his suffering benefactor...

programme.title: Point Of No Return
programme.desc: After police detective Lau is ambushed and killed, his best friend Pitt vows to get the killer. A series of investigation follows. Pitt finally finds an eyewitness to the killing - Fat Goose who is persuaded to testify against the killer Lam Man Fu. Lam Man Fu chases and attacks Pitt and Fat Goose. Finally, Pitt arrests him but Superintendent Keung frees Lam Man Fu and removes Pitt from the case. Then Lam Man Fu firebombs Fat Goose's residence. Fat Goose moves into Pitt's home and strikes a fast friendship with Angel, Pitt's reporter sister...

programme.title: Dreams Of Glory, A Boxer's Story.
programme.desc: Silent classmate Ming, an ambitious boxing addict, decides to learn boxing in Thailand after a technical knockdown in a contest which he was confident of winning. By witnessing the rigorous training on the spot, he not only develops the physique of a boxer but enhances the dignity and dauntless spirit of the boxer in a tournament. Tak is another young upcoming boxer. He learned Chinese martial arts from his father since childhood. Not wanting to be cooped up in the narrow confines of boxing only, he undergoes hard training in Thai boxing in a gym, hoping to widen the boxing horizon...

programme.title: E1 - The Digital Afterlife (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: Can AI cure grief? Inside the new techs using avatars to digitally resurrect the dead. FOR YOUTUBE: Across Japan, Taiwan and South Korea, families are using AI avatars, holograms and VR to say goodbye - or even keep the conversation going. Is this technology healing grief or prolonging it?

programme.title: E27 - Once Upon A Cuppa In China (Eng Subs)
programme.desc: Once dismissed as 'cough syrup', coffee in China now stands shoulder to shoulder with fine tea. Its rise mirrors the nation's evolution from copying global brands to beating them at home and abroad.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.desc: A young woman escapes the city for her country home & experiments with her mother’s collection of traditional recipes.

programme.title: The Tower
programme.desc: A young girl living in a Palestinian refugee camp learns about her family's history through stories told by three previous generations of refugees.

programme.title: Naughty Girl
programme.desc: A ecology student destroys a construction head's plans for an old forest park. Intrigued, he bets seven romantic days with her; if she leaves, he will give up his plans for the park. She accepts, but finds he challenges her preconceptions.

programme.title: UCI World Tour 2026 -Region Pays de la Loire Tour - Stage 3[Live]
E4
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E4

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E150
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. An accused stalker screams expletives at the judge; a shooting victim's mother cries for justice; an assistant prosecutor argues with the judge; and more.

programme.title: E2 - A Day of Cody's Favorite Things!
programme.desc: Join Cody for a day filled with all his favorite things! First, Cody gets to live out his dino dreams as he dons a dinosaur costume & pretends to be a monster attacking a toy bridge. The fun continues at school, where he starts playing a guitar & his classmates join in to form their very own rock band! Cody also shows his caring side as he & his friends encounter a lost baby duckling & lead the way to help it find the perfect home.

programme.title: E3 - Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Join Blippi on an adventure to the wonders of our world & beyond! First, he travels to the tallest mountain on Earth, Mt. Everest, with his new friend Betty the Yeti. Then, he dives deep into the ocean to explore a kelp forest with Jerry the Jellyfish. The adventure gets explosive as Blippi & FETCH fly into a volcano! After exploring the Earth, Blippi blasts off into space to tour the solar system, learn about gravity on the moon & discover how rainbows get their amazing colors!

programme.title: E6 - What Should I Be When I Grow Up?
programme.desc: What should Baby John be when he grows up? Join him as he explores different fun jobs! First, it's race day for Baby John & Manny! They each choose a vehicle to test on the racetrack: an ice cream truck against an ambulance! Then, it's superhero day at daycare, & Manny arrives in a luchador outfit. Everyone is curious, so he explains that luchadores are Mexican superheroes! The fun continues as Baby John drives a bus & picks up friends dressed in different professions.

programme.title: E5 - An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!
programme.desc: Join the Minibods for an adventure with pedals, rescues & stars! Lulu goes camping but realizes she's left her favorite Binky Bunny behind & has to learn how to cope. Then, Newt goes on an adventure to find a real-life Flutterbug, but she has to be brave when her bike's stabilizers come off! The adventures continue as Jeff overcomes his fear of mud to rescue his feather duster & Bubbles builds a rocket to try & reach a big purple star in the sky!

programme.title: E1 - Epic Rescues with Grandma Gecko!
programme.desc: Grandma Gecko is here to help with some epic rescues! The action starts when Weasel's accelerator gets stuck & he can't stop driving! Grandma Gecko & Gecko hop on a motorbike for a high-speed chase to save him. Then, when lots of vehicles get flat tires from nails on the road, Gecko feels the pressure & calls his Grandma to help him speedily change all the tires. From building a wind turbine to saving Blue, Grandma can do it all!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 故事背景設定在不久的將來，在這個世界中，人們過去的性關係通過一條發光的紅色「S線」在他們頭頂上方以視覺方式連接。一位刑警、一位神秘的老師，以及一個天生能看到這些線的少女，共同應對由這一現象引發的系列令人不安的事件。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E53
programme.desc: 此劇敘述年幼便出道養家的一線女演員與PD的愛情故事。女演員因母親賭博的債務及醜聞一夜之間跌落谷底。PD嘗試鼓勵她重新振作，女演員卻消失了……

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E10 - Prank Callers/Dizzy/Access Denied/Steak Me Amadeus/New Year's Kiss
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby decide to make prank phone calls. They try to prank the Master Prank Caller numerous times, although they fail to fool him (and only make him increasingly annoyed).
